title: Beyond Silver and Fine Gold

}}
'''Beyond Silver and Fine Gold''' is a [[World Quest]] Series about [[Nicole]].

Requirements: {{Quest|28;Witch's Lodge (Quest)}}.

==Quest Details==
* Once the World Quest is available, the player can follow the questline to explore the rooms within the [[Witch's Lodge]]. Each room must be fully explored to unlock the next.
* After completing the exploration of the current room, the subsequent room will unlock at 04:00 on the following Monday.
* It will take 4 weeks to complete the entire "Beyond Silver and Fine Gold" quest.

==List of Quests==
# [[The Joyous Floating Island]]
# [[The Silent Theater]]
# [[The Lost Palace]]
# [[The Forgotten Lighthouse]]

==Dialogue==
After completing the currently available quest and before the next quest becomes available, Nicole can be found at the top of the stairs in the Witch's Lodge with the following dialogue:
{{Dialogue Start}}
;(Talk to Nicole)
:{{A|vo dialog nkwq106 nicole 01.ogg}} '''Nicole:''' You want to open another chest? I'm afraid you've already claimed everything I have on hand.
:{{A|vo dialog nkwq106 nicole 02.ogg}} '''Nicole:''' If you really want more treasure, I should be able to scrape a few things together... How about you give me a few hundred years? Don't worry, you can wait that long if you try — you just have to believe in yourselves.
{{Dialogue End}}
